assertions.evidence: Section '1. Matriz de repurposing' with explicit table: Contenido base | Plataforma | Formato | Objetivo for all 3 platforms.
Twitter: 8-tweet hilo; LinkedIn: long reflective post (link in comment); Instagram: 7-slide carrusel. Each has different structure, tone, and notes.
